creator: james@french.id.au
text:
(In reply to Dries Michiels from comment #0)

In response to only .conf files being included by 13-CURRENT the behaviour in 12.1-RELEASE (and 11.4-RELEASE?) is all files in newsyslog.conf.d are included so the sample file has to be installed elsewhere, the patch I provided on the other bug installs it with the other sample config files.

Nice to see that we're both running into this one for the same reason though (ZFS)!
